title: Smiley Player Trader
description: Allows you to trade with players using the Villager GUI.
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/GjhaxN9.png) Smiley Player Trader allows you to trade with other players using the Minecraft Villager trading GUI.​

[Commands](https://github.com/Mrcomputer1/SmileyPlayerTrader/wiki/Commands) | [Permissions](https://github.com/Mrcomputer1/SmileyPlayerTrader/wiki/Permissions) | [Configuration](https://github.com/Mrcomputer1/SmileyPlayerTrader/wiki/Configuration)

# Basic Usage Instructions ![Step 1 - Run the "/spt" command to open the menu.](https://i.imgur.com/ohtKqJ2.png) **Step 1:** Run the "/spt" command to open the menu. ![Step 2 - Press the "Create New Product" button (the emerald).](https://i.imgur.com/cG75kUW.png) **Step 2:** Press the "Create New Product" button (the emerald). ![Step 3 - Place the item you wish to sell into the inventory slot.](https://i.imgur.com/lNoedLm.png) **Step 3:** Place the item you wish to sell into the inventory slot. ![Step 4 - Click the "Set Primary Cost" button (the single Gold Ingot).](https://i.imgur.com/vLj3IJC.png) **Step 4:** Click the "Set Primary Cost" button (the single Gold Ingot). ![Step 5 - Insert the price item, select an item from the quick items row or press the beacon for more items to choose from.](https://i.imgur.com/V7B6oEF.png) **Step 5:** Insert the price item, select an item from the quick items row or press the beacon for more items to choose from. ![Step 6 - Other players can now trade with you by Right Clicking you or using "/spt trade ".](https://i.imgur.com/9Cefqfz.png) **Step 6:** Other players can now trade with you by Right Clicking you or using "/spt trade ".
**Tip:** You can use the "/spt help" command for a list of available commands. # Optional Dependencies * [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) - used for offline permission checking, only needed if you want offline trading and restrict "smileyplayertrader.merchant" permission. * PlaceholderAPI - provides some PlaceholderAPI expansions you can use. See [this](https://github.com/Mrcomputer1/SmileyPlayerTrader/wiki/Placeholders) wiki page for a list of the supported expansions. * WorldGuard - provides a flag to disable trading in a region. See [this](https://github.com/Mrcomputer1/SmileyPlayerTrader/wiki/WorldGuard-Flags) wiki page for more information. # Supported Versions * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 26.2 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 26.1.2 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 26.1.1 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 26.1 (since version 1.7.33) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.11 (since version 1.7.32) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.10 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.9 (since version 1.7.27) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.8 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.7 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.6 (since version 1.7.24) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.5 (since version 1.7.18) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.4 (since version 1.7.17) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.3 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.2 (since version 1.7.16) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.1 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21 (since version 1.7.7) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.20.6 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.20.5 (since version 1.7.6) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.20.4 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.20.3 (since version 1.7.4) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.20.2 (since version 1.7.1) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.20.1 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.20 (since version 1.6.4) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.19.4 (since version 1.6.3) * Bukkit/Spgiot/Paper 1.19.3 (since version 1.6.0) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.19.2 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.19.1 (since version 1.5.0) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.19 (since version 1.4.5) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.18.2 (since version 1.4.4) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.18.1 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.18 (since version 1.4.1) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.17.1 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.17 (since version 1.3.0) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.16.5 (since version 1.3.0) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.16.4 (since version 1.2.2) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.16.3 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.16.2 (since version 1.2.1) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.16.1 (since version 1.2.0) * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.15.2 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.15.1 * Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.15

[Discord](https://discord.gg/SdM6f7U) | [Report Bugs](https://github.com/Mrcomputer1/SmileyPlayerTrader/issues) | [Suggest Features](https://github.com/Mrcomputer1/SmileyPlayerTrader/discussions) | [GitHub](https://github.com/Mrcomputer1/SmileyPlayerTrader)

# Metrics This plugin uses bStats. You can view the metrics [here](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/SmileyPlayerTrader). If you do not wish to allow bStats to collect metrics, you can opt-out in the bStats configuration file in the plugins directory. The font used in the header image and the tutorial images is [Ubuntu font](https://font.ubuntu.com).
